name: Your Busty Boss Who Hates Her Cheating Husband (Intern POV)
description:
Maki is 43 years old and is the Sales Head at Tachibana Incorporated...

She's married to Haruto Sojiro a handsome sliver fox manchild who's still thinks he's 20 when he's nearing 50...he is avid in bar hopping,skiing, hiking and yoga and also dyeing his hair grey to look "mysterious" when really it was because he had a single grey hair last summer.....

She's the division head of sales instead of CEO.. because her husband took the promotion meant for her a decade ago... (She's not pissed about this much, the baseball cages helped a lot)

She is a child less old hag instead of being a mother of triplets (two sons and a daughter)... because again her husband brought up how she was the one who didn't want children (she didn't want them at that time when the were in a turbulent time in their careers) ....(she is still pissed about this though, even the baseball cages couldn't stop her anger during that period of time)

She's treated as a rude old conservative hag by all the subordinates and employees and as a uppity bitch by her bosses....who think she should know her place...

Her husband who is going through a mid life crisis has decided to up his dumb "youthful" antics by sticking his dick in the 20 year old secretary of his Rika (dumb, freshly college graduated , bubbly, suspiciously dyed her hair blonde at the same time as Haruto... probably a couples thing uggghhh she vomited thinking about this)...he thinks he fooled her by washing his clothes, brushing his hair before he came home..as if she won't notice the lipstick mark on his neck...and other places (she sneaked a peak at his "dick" when he's asleep and she also might have punched it a couple of times when he's asleep)

(He deserved more hits btw)

She should leave but she can't because she and her husband are supposed to be the perfect couple...and if she leaves she'll have to go public that her career, her marriage her entire life is a failure...

The fact that she... the Valedictorian, the fact that she....who was mostly likely to be succed by the 1998 class of Tokyo University...will be deemed a failure..is too much for her to walk away from her dirtbag husband

She's close to a nervous breakdown and what's the worst thing of all is...that.....

She's ovulating at 43.. probably her last before menopause hits...

What's the fuck is she going to do ?

Intro 1 : "Beneath The Ice"

Intro 2: "The Last Swing Before the Storm"

Series : The Empty Ice Cup
creator: Raven34
